check_content_excerpt:
Verify the version of the operating system is vendor supported.

Check the version of the operating system with the following command:

# cat /etc/redhat-release

Red Hat Enterprise Linux Server release 7.9 (Maipo)

Current End of Maintenance Support for RHEL 7.9 is 30 June 2024.

If the release is not supported by the vendor, this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt: Upgrade to a supported version of the operating system.
title: The Red Hat Enterprise Linux operating system must be a vendor supported release.
